# PERF-209 negative: pre-build the dependency in a sync.Once
# called once, not via a hook that runs for every subcommand
lang: go
file: PERF-209-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
	"sync"
)

var (
	dbOnce sync.Once
	dbErr  error
)

func connectDatabase() error { return nil }

func ensureDB() error {
	dbOnce.Do(func() {
		dbErr = connectDatabase()
	})
	return dbErr
}

var RootCmd = &cobra.Command{
	Use:   "mytool",
	Short: "mytool does things",
	// No PersistentPreRunE; subcommands call ensureDB lazily on
	// first use.
}
